name: RPlog_The_Trip_to_Ord_Trasi
title: Descent on Ord Trasi
summary: Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin pilots the stolen YT-2400 Whipping Star toward the Sith world of Ord Trasi, intent on proving himself worthy of Malign and the Sith, with the captive Jedi Johanna te Danaan and the eager officer Dareus aboard. Throughout the hyperspace journey, Danik presses Johanna to teach him to wield her lightsaber, while she scornfully warns that the weapon and the Dark Side of the planet are far beyond any untrained mortal -- a debate Dareus joins in defense of Imperial doctrine. Holding her son Etiel as leverage, Danik insists, and tensions flare until the ship arrives over the doomed, grey-skied world. The party lands and establishes a perimeter, with Dareus commanding the ground troops and Johanna leading a scouting expedition. As Danik feels the Dark Side's oppressive weight for the first time, Johanna senses danger and cuts down a lurking goblin-like creature, confirming that Ord Trasi holds far worse in store and sending Dareus's troops into a panicked defensive firefight.
